description:
The SessionControlDialog component is used to edit and view session settings like permissions, roles, and name to list a few.

See Session.

fields.ActiveTab: The tab this view is currently on.
fields._contentRoot: Where to place visuals for session options.
fields._worldName: The field containing the session name.
fields._maxUsers: The field containing the session max users.
fields._awayKickEnabled: The field containing the session away kick enabler.
fields._awayKickMinutes: The field containing the session away kick minutes.
fields._autosaveEnabled: The field containing the session auto save enabler.
fields._autosaveMinutes: The field containing the session auto save minutes.
fields._autocleanEnabled: The field containing the session auto clean enabler.
fields._autocleanMinutes: The field containing the session auto clean minutes.
fields._mobileFriendly: The field containing the session mobile friendly enabler.
fields._hideFromListing: The field containing the session hide from listing enabler.
fields._description: The field containing the session description.
fields._worldNameButton: The button to edit the session name.
fields._descriptionButton: The button to edit the session description.
fields._maxUsersButton: The button to edit the session max users.
fields._awayKickEnabledButton: The button to edit the session away kick enabled status.
fields._awayKickMinutesButton: The button to edit the session away kick minutes.
fields._autosaveEnabledButton: The button to edit the session auto save enabled status.
fields._autosaveMinutesButton: The button to edit the session auto save minutes.
fields._autocleanEnabledButton: The button to edit the session auto clean enabled button.
fields._autocleanMinutesButton: The button to edit the session auto clean minutes.
fields._mobileFriendlyButton: The button to edit the session mobile friendly enabled status.
fields._hideFromListingButton: The button to edit the session hide from listing enabled status.
fields._permissionOverridesIndicator: The element that shows how many user overrides are currently active for permissions
fields._permissionOverridesButton: The button that resets all user overrides for permissions.
fields._getSessionOrb: The button that gets the session orb.
fields._getWorldOrb: The button that gets the world orb.
fields._editMode: The button that enables edit mode for the local user.
fields._copySessionURL: The button that copies the session URL.
fields._copyWorldURL: The button that copies the world URL.
fields._copyRecordURL: The button that copies the record URL.
fields._accessLevelRadios: The set of radios to set session access level.
fields._accessLevelRadiosButtons: The set of radio buttons to set session access level.
fields._worldNameSync: The field that is used to edit the world Name.
fields._descriptionSync: The field that is used to edit the world description.
fields._maxUsersSync: The field that is used to edit the world max Users.
fields._awayKickEnabledSync: The field that is used to edit the world away Kick Enabled.
fields._awayKickMinutesSync: The field that is used to edit the world away Kick Minutes.
fields._autosaveEnabledSync: The field that is used to edit the world auto save Enabled.
fields._autosaveMinutesSync: The field that is used to edit the world auto save Minutes.
fields._autocleanEnabledSync: The field that is used to edit the world auto clean Enabled.
fields._autocleanSecondsSync: The field that is used to edit the world auto clean Seconds.
fields._mobileFriendlySync: The field that is used to edit the world mobile Friendly.
fields._hideFromListingSync: The field that is used to edit the world hide From Listing.
fields._editModeSync: The field that is used to edit the world edit Mode status for the local user.
fields._accessLevelSync: The field that is used to edit the world access Level.
fields._customVerifierLabel: The label used to indicate the world's custom verifier.
fields._customVerifierCheckbox: The checkbox for enabling/disabling a custom world verifier.
fields._customVerifierButton: The button for enabling/disabling a custom world verifier.
fields._customVerifierSync: The field that is used to edit the world custom Verifier.
fields._uiContentRoot: The slot that contains all the ui content of the world.
fields._slideSwap: The swap region used to make the animation for going between session menu views.
fields._saveWorld: The button to save world changes.
fields._saveWorldAs: The button to save the world as a certain name.
fields._saveWorldCopy: The button to save a copy of the world.
fields._tabButtons: A list of the buttons used to change between session menu views.

methods.SwitchTab: Called when a session menu tab button is touched.
methods.GetSessionOrb: Called when the get session orb button is touched.
methods.GetWorldOrb: Called when the get world orb button is touched.
methods.CopySessionURL: Called when the copy session url button is touched.
methods.CopyWorldURL: Called when the copy world url button is touched.
methods.CopyRecordURL: Called when the copy record url button is touched.
methods.CustomVerifierPressed: Called when the custom verifier button is touched.
methods.OnEnableCustomJoinVerifier: Called when the enable custom verifier button is touched.
methods.OnClearUserPermissionOverrides: Called when the clear custom permission overrides button is touched.
methods.OnSave: Called when the save world button is touched.
methods.OnSaveAs: Called when the save world as button is touched.
methods.OnSaveCopy: Called when the save world copy button is touched.
